semantic_description: Verifies an iterative binary search over a sorted integer array. The function keeps left and right bounds, checks the middle element, returns an index whose array value equals target when found, and returns -1 only when every valid array element is different from target. The loop is a while loop over an input array and does not modify memory; it must preserve IntArray::full(a, n, l). Edge cases include an empty search interval such as n == 0, where right starts at -1 and the loop is skipped.
